summary: BLOCK 75.2 Dual-Action Hunter Buttons - All features tested and working. Backend APIs (9 tests) pass 100%. Frontend UI verified via Playwright: dual buttons present with correct styling, click functionality working for both 'Add to Collection' and 'Actively Seeking' actions.
critical_code_review_comments: WishlistCard correctly implements dual buttons side-by-side in flex container with gap-2 (8px)
'Add to Collection' button has solid honey gold gradient background (linear-gradient(135deg, #E8A820, #DAA520)) with dark text (#1A1A1A)
'Actively Seeking' button has glass style with transparent background (rgba(255,215,0,0.1)) and brushed gold border (2px solid #DAA520)
Both buttons have h-7 height (28px) and flex-1 for equal width
Delete trash button retained with correct styling
POST /api/iso/{id}/convert-to-collection endpoint correctly creates record and deletes ISO item
PUT /api/iso/{id}/promote endpoint correctly changes status from WISHLIST to OPEN with HIGH priority
seed_data_creation: Used demouser with 2 dream items: 'Blonde' by Frank Ocean and 'good kid, m.A.A.d city' by Kendrick Lamar. Test data restored after functional testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 75.2 Dual-Action Hunter Buttons fully tested. Dream List cards now have two buttons: 'Add to Collection' (solid honey gold) calls POST /api/iso/{id}/convert-to-collection, 'Actively Seeking' (glass with gold border) calls PUT /api/iso/{id}/promote. Both remove the card from Dream List. Delete trash button still works. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_dual_hunter_buttons.py. Test credentials: demo@test.com / demouser.

backend: GET /api/iso/dreamlist - returns user's dream items with WISHLIST status (200 OK)
POST /api/iso/{id}/convert-to-collection - converts dream item to collection record (200 OK)
PUT /api/iso/{id}/promote - promotes dream item to OPEN status with HIGH priority (200 OK)
frontend: Dream List cards display two side-by-side action buttons
'Add to Collection' button has solid honey gold background with dark text
'Actively Seeking' button has transparent glass style with brushed gold border
Both buttons have equal height (28px / h-7) and 8px gap between them
Clicking 'Add to Collection' removes card from Dream List and adds to Collection
Clicking 'Actively Seeking' removes card from Dream List and promotes to ISO
Delete trash button still functions correctly
Toast notifications show on successful actions ('is now on the hunt', 'is now in your Hive')
Treasury header still works - Collection Value and Dream Records tabs
Price badges (---) still show on Dream List cards
